cases.prompt: What have we learned across our sessions so far?

assertions.text: The skill reviews and surfaces the project learnings that gstack has accumulated across sessions.
The response presents the learnings rather than generating new advice from scratch.

cases.prompt: 오래된 학습 내용을 정리해줘, 더 이상 유효하지 않은 건 빼고.

assertions.text: The skill prunes stale or no-longer-valid learnings from the stored set.
The skill keeps still-relevant learnings while removing only the stale ones.
The skill manages the persisted learnings store rather than answering an unrelated question.

cases.prompt: Export all the learnings we've gathered so I can share them.

assertions.text: The skill exports the collected learnings into a shareable output.
The export includes the learnings accumulated across sessions, not a single session.
